description: A new preview integration `Aspire.Hosting.Radius` lets Aspire AppHosts target Radius as a compute environment alongside Kubernetes, Docker Compose, and Azure Container Apps. Call `AddRadiusEnvironment()` and `aspire publish`/deploy emits a native `app.bicep` and runs `rad deploy`. Run mode is inert — local development is unchanged. Includes in-code Azure and AWS cloud providers with typed credential modes that are never inlined into generated Bicep.
name: Aspire.Hosting.Radius integration (preview)
